title: Eternal Matching | A advanced bungee server queue plugin |
description: A must-have for mini-game group servers | Need BungeeCord or Velocity | Highly customizable |
body:
Eternal Matching - The Ultimate Plugin

If there's anything you don't understand after reading this page, please check the [Wiki](https://www.spigotmc.org/wiki/eternalmatching-main-page/).

Revolutionize Your Minecraft Network with Next-Level Matching Technology.

Why Choose Eternal Matching/Bungee Queue?
- Immersive Audio Experience - Dynamic sound effects that guide players through every step of the matching process
- Striking Visual Feedback - Eye-catching title animations that keep players informed and engaged
- Gorgeous GUI Design - Sleek, intuitive interfaces with smooth transitions and vibrant colors
- Intelligent Auto-Join System - Effortless queue management with smart server allocation
- Real-Time Server Detection - MOTD verification technology that accurately tracks server status
- Modern Aesthetic - Stunning colorful glass elements that elevate your server's visual appeal
- Broad Compatibility - Seamless support across multiple Minecraft versions
- Enhanced Customization - Works with PlaceholderAPI for personalized player experiences
- Advanced support - Support for proxy servers Bungee and Velocity
- Quick Match - Quickly find a suitable room
- Stability Support - Using Asynchronous Processing for Matching
- TabCompleter - Fast to use command !

Simple Commands
- /eternalmatching or /em - Access the main menu and command center
- Permissions
- eternalmatching.open - Allow players to access the matching system
- eternalmatching.admin - Grant administrative control over the plugin
- Important Notes
- Support - Encounter a bug? Please visit our discussion group rather than leaving a review.
- Community - Join our plugin community for updates, support, and tips: 983329726
- Demo Server - Experience the plugin firsthand on our official server: ICEBELLS (mc520.xin)

Transform your server network with the most advanced matching system available. Eternal Matching isn't just a plugin—it's a complete player experience enhancement.

[Bstats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/EternalMatching/26589)
